body_preview: - Trajectory graph pressure #1: `transcript_only_failed_tool_count=2` — transcript logs contain tool failures absent from state events - Trajectory graph pressure #2: `state_only_failed_tool_count=13` — state events contain tool failures unmatched in transcript records - These are computed by `scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py` line 2666-2667 using `uniqu
expected_evidence: `state failures --recent` output organized by run ID, enabling per-session cross-reference with transcripts The session grouping surfaces which sessions have the most tool failures, highlighting candidates for reconciliation investigation Future dashboard scoring or `log_feedback.py` can consume per-session failure counts from this command Implementation Not
title: Add per-session tool failure grouping to `state failures --recent`
